extract: Lugia (Japanese: ルギア Lugia) is a dual-type Psychic/Flying Legendary Pokémon introduced in Generation II. It is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon. Lugia and Ho-Oh are often collectively referred to as the tower duo by fans. It is also often viewed as the leader of the legendary birds due to its role in the movie The Power of One, the Mystery Dungeon series, and Pokémon Pokopia. Lugia is the game mascot of Pokémon Silver Version and its remake, Pokémon SoulSilver Version, appearing on the boxart of both games. It also has a unique variant called Shadow Lugia, codenamed XD001, who is the game mascot of Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness and plays a major role in its story.
